How to Buy?

Partnered with

Our Mission

As the only prospectus-based ETF ERC20 tokens offering a mirror to a database of institutional listed ETFs, both retail and qualified investors can invest and trade today. $ETFS is a Trade-to-Earn incentive token created specifically for the ETHSwap platform, a trustless decentralized protocol that provides direct access to institutional ETFs.

How it works

Connect your wallet to our platform

Browse our ETF index screener

Swap your chosen Cryptocurrency with a publicly listed ETF

Access Institutional ETFs

Cryptocurrency ETFs (Spot/Future)

These ETFs track the performance of crypto ETFs from leading institutions like Blackrock, Fidelity, etc.,

Leveraged ETFs

Leveraged ETFs use financial derivatives and leverage to amplify the returns of an underlying index or asset by up to 100x

Commodity ETFs

Commodity ETFs track the performance of commodities such as gold, silver, oil, agricultural products, and other raw materials.

Fixed Income ETFs

Fixed Income ETFs invest in bonds, treasuries, and other fixed-income securities.

Platform Features

Swap

ETFSwap makes trading easy and rewarding. Our decentralized infrastructure allows you to swap assets securely and cost effectively across multiple markets

Stake

Adding your assets to pools provides liquidity for swap trading. Earn yield from trading fees as each ETF pool’s trading volume grows.

Perpetual Futures & Options

Trading in long and short options directly from the platform, offering you up to 50x leverage across all listed ETFS.

Staking

By staking $ETFS tokens, investors can earn rewards from our 5% sell tax, which goes to a dedicated reward pool. Staking provides a unique opportunity for our community to earn $ETFS token rewards while supporting the growth by being part of the institutional ETF Revolution.

24/7 access Limited to trading hours
No requirements KYC required
No extra fees Between 20bps to 2%
Ability to trade anytime Can be impacted by out of hours news
Ability to stake ETFS No staking options via banks
Trade in minutes Account opening may take up to 24hrs
Be in full control Banks are in full control

Why Use ETFSWap?

ETFSwap  is the cornerstone of change in a banking landscape that has remained static for too long. Here, investors are not bound by cumbersome rules of the old banking world. There are several benefits of using ETFSwap:

Ease of Trading

DeFi enables 24/7 trading, which offers greater flexibility than centralized ETFs.

No KYC

ETFSwap requires no KYC registration, which means you can open an account in minutes

Low Costs

Smart contract driven products require no fund manager, hence no extra management fees.

Flexibility

ETFSwap allows you to switch between crypto and ETFs in seconds, whereas some Banks do not allow crypto trading.

Extra Income

Our native token ETFS enables you to earn up to 87% APR yield.

 Benefits Of Investing In ETFS Token

Trading Discounts

ETFS the primary currency within the ETFSwap ecosystem. To make the most of our platform, we’re offering a unique, trading fee discount system.

Passive Income

Earn up to 36% from ETFSwap's staking pool linked directly to our  ETF Swap liquidity.

Automic Rewards

All sell tax fees are added into the ETFS reward pool which is airdropped back to tokenholders on a monthly basis.

Lower Fees

ETFS holders will benefit from lower trading fees on the platform.

Voting Rights

ETFS holders will have voting rights within the platform governance system, enabling them to shape the future.

Early Access

You will get access to early release ETF listings as well updates on exclusive investment opportunities.

Why hybrid Institutional Crypto ETFs are set to explode.

Since the introduction of the first Gold ETF in 2006, which revolutionized the gold market, prominent market experts are increasingly convinced that listing several institutional crypto ETFs will have a similar impact by changing the trajectory of Web3.0 growth. Spot bitcoin ETF applications have been submitted by mainstream financial firms such as BlackRock (BLK.N) and Fidelity, as well as crypto-focused firms such as Grayscale. ETFSwap intends to be on the cutting edge of this disruptive moment by creating the first decentralized protocol that offers direct access to institutional ETFs.

Our Roadmap

Stage 1

  • Website launch
  • Obtaining the necessary licenses 
  • Smart Contract Audit
  • Platform launch Beta Mode
  • Community and Marketing Development

Stage 2 

  • Launch partnerships program
  • Increase marketing
  • Launch staking dapp
  • Community rewards
  • Team formation
  • Launch ETFSwap platform

Stage 3

  • Complete Presale
  • Token launch Uniswap  
  • Launch staking dapp
  • Coin Market Cap Listing
  • Early token release competitions
  • Add KOLs

ETFSwap Easy To Use Platform

Featured Partners

Frequently Asked Questions

At the end of the presale we will air drop it to the receiving wallet you have provided us. Have you completed an audit?

We plan to list on DEX and CEX exchanges upon launch, further listing details will be provided closer to launch.

1% buy, proceeds of which will be burnt
5% Sell, proceeds of which will be added to the rewards pool

Any unsold tokens will be burnt, in addition all team tokens will be unlocked after 18 months and the liquidity pool will be locked.

We have currently applied for a license and should be approved by the end of Q2 2024.

Please visit our Linktree to check all of our channels and communities.

Depending on the ETF Pool you have invested in, the APR vary from 8% - 86% per annum.

Once the ETFSwap platform is launched, we plan to start generating revenue immediately with an estimated daily volume of $20m in month 1, growing by 100%-200% month on month, due to the demand for access to institutional ETF pools.

ETFSwap is a decentralized trading platform which enables you to swap crypto with listed ETFs. Also stake your tokens in our protocol and start earning an income. Invest in our $ETFS presale to take advantage of the discounted price and be part of the crypto ETF growth.
